meta.title: Le joco quotidian de parolas
meta.description: Divina le parola celate in 6 tentativos (o minus). Un nove enigma es disponibile cata die!
meta.keywords: interlingua, enigma, parola, joco, in linea, divinar, quotidian

text.no_attempts: You haven't tried any words yet!
text.share_challenge_win: Io ha solvite le Wordle de hodie in {n} tentativos. Pote tu facer melio?
text.share_challenge_lose: Io non ha solvite le Wordle de hodie. E tu?
text.hard_mode_position: Modo difficile: {letter} debe esser in position {position}
text.hard_mode_contains: Modo difficile: le tentativa debe continer {letter}

help.title: How to Play
help.text_1_2: Each guess must be a valid five letter word. Press the enter button to submit your guess.
help.text_1_3: After you guess, the tiles will change color to indicate which letters of your word are correct or almost correct.
help.text_2_1: is in the word and in the correct location!
help.text_2_2: is in the word, but not in the correct location.
help.text_2_3: is not present in the word you are trying to guess.
help.text_3: A new word will be available each day!

ui.word_info_desc: Definition e arte AI post le joco
ui.install_app_desc: Jocar sin connexion e obtener le icone
ui.play_more_languages: Joca plus linguas pro vider tu statisticas global!
ui.play_daily_like_app: Joca Wordle cata die como un app
ui.no_games_yet: Tu non ha ancora jocate. Elige un lingua pro comenciar!
ui.easy_desc: Qualcunque parola es acceptate, mesmo si non es in le dictionario
ui.normal_desc: Le tentativos debe esser parolas valide del dictionario
ui.hard_desc: Le indicios revelate debe esser usate in le tentativos sequente
ui.todays_word_reveal: Le parola de hodie — Joca pro revelar!
ui.future_word: Iste parola non ha ancora essite jocate. Reveni plus tarde!
ui.difficulty_locked: Non pote cambiar le difficultate post haber devinato
